change_request: Create global FAQ page at /en/faq and /es/faq with collapsible accordion, 7 bilingual questions in lib/faq.ts, educational section, CTA banner, and lead form
acceptance_criteria: lib/faq.ts created with 7 bilingual FAQItem entries and getFAQItems() helper
components/sections/faq-accordion.tsx is a client component with single-open accordion
app/[lang]/faq/page.tsx renders hero + accordion + educational + CTA + form
faq key in en.ts and es.ts updated to page-level strings
old items array removed from translations

scope.change_request: Create global FAQ page at /en/faq and /es/faq with collapsible accordion, 7 bilingual questions in lib/faq.ts, educational section, CTA banner, and lead form
acceptance_criteria: lib/faq.ts created with 7 bilingual FAQItem entries and getFAQItems() helper
components/sections/faq-accordion.tsx is a client component with single-open accordion
app/[lang]/faq/page.tsx renders hero + accordion + educational + CTA + form
faq key in en.ts and es.ts updated to page-level strings
old items array removed from translations

llm_analysis.assessment: The changes match the change request by creating a global FAQ page with bilingual content, a collapsible accordion, and additional sections.

risks: app/[lang]/faq/page.tsx:generateMetadata - Incorrect metadata generation could affect SEO.
components/sections/faq-accordion.tsx:FaqAccordion - Accordion functionality may break if state management fails.
lib/faq.ts:getFAQItems - Incorrect language mapping could lead to wrong FAQ items being displayed.

llm_analysis.notes: The code handles empty inputs for FAQ items but lacks explicit handling for null or missing inputs.
No breaking changes or migrations are needed as the changes are additive.

llm_analysis.recommendation: Add unit tests for the FaqAccordion component and integration tests for the FAQ page rendering.

rollback.head: b2f3084bb8670b8c8f0f3df362e74f338c64cd38
rollback_steps: 2. Resolve any merge conflicts if prompted
rollback.additional_cleanup: Review affected files for any required data/config cleanup

overall.summary: The changes fulfill the requirements of the change request by implementing the FAQ page with the necessary components and content. There are no major concerns, but testing should be added to ensure robustness.
